1: Before the gods will I sing praise unto thee.
2: For thou hast magnified thy word above all thy name.
3: And And strengthenedst me with with strength in my soul.
4: When they hear the words of thy mouth.
5: For great is is the glory of the LORD LORD .
6: But the proud he knoweth afar off.
7: Thou shalt stretch forth thine hand against the wrath of mine enemies, and thy right hand shall save me.
8: Thy mercy, O LORD LORD , endureth endureth for ever: Forsake not the works of thine own hands.
